settings_audio.title: Audio
settings_audio.description: Choose which microphone Souffle listens to and configure audio processing.
settings_audio.vad_enabled_desc: Filter out silence and noise before transcription using Silero VAD.
settings_audio.filler_removal_desc: Remove filler words like "uh", "um", "euh" from transcriptions.
settings_audio.stutter_collapse_desc: Collapse repeated words (3+ repetitions) into a single occurrence.
settings_audio.dictionary_correction_desc: Correct misrecognized words using your custom dictionary.

settings_dictionary.title: Custom Dictionary
settings_dictionary.description: Add proper nouns, technical terms, or names that are often misrecognized.

settings_interface.title: Interface
settings_interface.auto_paste_desc: Automatically pastes the transcript when you stop recording.
settings_interface.paste_delay_desc: Wait time before pasting. Increase if the text lands in the wrong app.
settings_interface.toggle_recording_desc: Press once to start or stop dictation.
settings_interface.push_to_talk_desc: Hold to record, release to stop.

settings_intelligence.title: Summarization
settings_intelligence.description: Souffle uses a local Ollama server to generate meeting summaries.
settings_intelligence.ollama_url_desc: Address of your local Ollama server.
settings_intelligence.models_found: {count, plural, one {{count} model found.} other {{count} models found.}}
settings_intelligence.no_compatible_model: No compatible model found. Install a model like Llama or Mistral to enable summaries.

settings_diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
settings_diagnostics.debug_logs_desc: Log extra details about speech recognition for troubleshooting.

model_gate.title: Transcription Model
model_gate.description: Choose the speech-to-text model Souffle uses for dictation and meetings.
model_gate.download_stored_info: The model is stored on your Mac and reused across sessions.
model_gate.load_info: First load may take a few seconds while the model is prepared.
model_gate.keep_app_open: Keep the app open while files download.
model_gate.delete_confirm: Delete downloaded model files from disk?

recorder.desc_locked: Stop the meeting recording before starting dictation.
recorder.desc_recording: Speak naturally. Text appears as you talk.
recorder.desc_downloading: Downloading in the background. You can keep using the app.
recorder.desc_needs_download: Download the model to start using dictation.
recorder.desc_needs_load: Load the model to start recording.

transcript.title: Transcript
transcript.empty_starting_msg: Text will appear as you speak.
transcript.empty_recording_msg: Text will appear as you speak.
transcript.empty_idle_msg: Press the mic button to start.

meeting_history.title: Meeting History
meeting_history.no_meetings_msg: Start a meeting recording to build your transcript library.

new_meeting.locked_by_dictation: Stop the dictation before starting a meeting.
new_meeting.model_not_ready: Download and load the transcription model in Settings first.
new_meeting.empty_title_hint: Leave empty to use the current date

meeting_header.locked_by_dictation: Stop the dictation before recording a meeting.

meeting_transcript.title: Transcript
meeting_transcript.edit_hint: Edit the transcript before generating a summary.

meeting_summary.title: Summary
meeting_summary.can_regenerate: You can regenerate the summary once the recording is stopped.
meeting_summary.new_audio_added: New audio was added since this summary was generated.
meeting_summary.stop_to_generate: Stop the recording to generate a summary.
meeting_summary.no_summary_yet: No summary yet. Generate one below.
meeting_summary.connect_ollama: Connect Ollama in Settings to enable summaries.
meeting_summary.no_compatible_model: No compatible Ollama model found. Install a model like Llama or Mistral to enable summaries.

pipeline.lagging: Transcription is running behind the audio — words may appear with a delay.
pipeline.stalled: Transcription appears stalled — audio is queuing up without being processed.
